name: Franks and Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 3 large green peppers, cut into half-inch strips
1 pound frankfurters, cut into one-inch chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Heat oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Cook the peppers and onions until tender-crisp, about 8 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Remove from heat and stir in the frankfurters and remaining ingredients except potatoes.
5. Arrange frozen potato rounds evenly over the mixture in the skillet.
6. Bake for 30 minutes or until the potatoes are well browned, turning them after 15 minutes.
7. Gently toss before serving.
